description: Style NoteCelebrate Indian traditional style with this cotton mull woven dupatta from fabindia. The stylish tassels held together with beads makes this a must buy, sitting firm on your shoulder it'll add an ethnic zing to your outfit. Wear this special piece over kurtas, leggings and heeled sandals.Product DetailsBlue dupatta with tassels and bead-work at the hemMaterial and CareCotton mullWash separately in cold waterWring the garment of excess waterTwist top to bottom and leave to dryStore piece in wrung position until the next wearSizeApproximate length: 240 cmApproximate width: 78 cm
